adt_book_date.text: วันที่หนังสือทวง

root.sql:
select sc_rep_kep_return_month.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_rep_kep_return_month.membership_no ) as membername ,sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group.member_group_keeping ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ,sc_rep_kep_return_month.membership_no ,sc_rep_kep_return_month.count_month ,sc_rep_kep_return_month.last_month ,sc_rep_kep_return_month.last_year + 543 as last_year
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group ,sc_rep_kep_return_month where ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_rep_kep_return_month.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ) and ( sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group.member_group_keeping = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.keeping_fingroup ) and ( sc_rep_kep_return_month.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_rep_kep_return_month.membership_no
